etymology.description: иЎӨ("clothing") + иЎҖ(иЎҖ) (xuГЁ, "blood") = phonetic element within Cantonese by replacing the radical of жҒӨ(жҒӨ) (xГ№, "condolence") -> final form relates to clothing, specifically undergarment
etymology.interpretation: The character иЈҮ(sГ№, "undergarment") combines the semantic element of "clothing" indicated by иЎӨ, with the phonetic influence of иЎҖ(xuГЁ, "blood") in its formation, adapted from жҒӨ(xГ№, "condolence"), aligning with its meaning related to garments worn under regular clothing.
